mod-colorhandle-size.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorHandle`, `.spectrum-ColorHandle.is-focused, .spectrum-ColorHandle:focus-visible`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-color-handle-size)`, if not set.

mod-colorhandle-border-width.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorHandle`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-color-handle-border-width)`, if not set.

mod-colorhandle-border-color.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorHandle`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-white)`, if not set.

mod-colorhandle-outer-border-width.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorHandle`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-colorhandle-outer-border-width)`, if not set.

mod-colorhandle-outer-border-color.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorHandle`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-colorhandle-outer-border-color)`, if not set.

mod-colorhandle-animation-duration.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorHandle`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-animation-duration-100)`, if not set.

mod-colorhandle-hitarea-size.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorHandle:after`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-color-control-track-width)`, if not set.

mod-colorhandle-focused-size.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorHandle.is-focused, .spectrum-ColorHandle:focus-visible`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-color-handle-size-key-focus)`, if not set.

mod-colorhandle-border-color-disabled.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorHandle.is-disabled`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-disabled-content-color)`, if not set.

mod-colorhandle-fill-color-disabled.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorHandle.is-disabled`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-disabled-background-color)`, if not set.

mod-colorhandle-inner-border-width.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorHandle-inner`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-color-handle-inner-border-width)`, if not set.

mod-colorhandle-inner-border-color.description: Used by `.spectrum-ColorHandle-inner`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-colorhandle-inner-border-color)`, if not set.

highcontrast-colorhandle-border-color-di.description: Defined in `.spectrum-ColorHandle.is-disabled`. Used by `.spectrum-ColorHandle.is-disabled`. Defaults to `var(--mod-colorhandle-border-color-disabled, var(--spectrum-disabled-content-color))`, if not set.

highcontrast-colorhandle-fill-color-disa.description: Defined in `.spectrum-ColorHandle.is-disabled`. Used by `.spectrum-ColorHandle.is-disabled`. Defaults to `var(--mod-colorhandle-fill-color-disabled, var(--spectrum-disabled-background-color))`, if not set.
